notes: Public-candidate research-use draft: the second-disease (Parkinson) export of the Gene-Disease Evidence Index, built with the clean single-MONDO ClinVar source_record_id format.
Research-use only: not medical advice, diagnosis, treatment guidance, patient risk prediction, clinical decision support, clinical certainty, or a manuscript-grade dataset.
Scope: Parkinson disease (MONDO:0005180); 6 seed genes (SNCA, LRRK2, PRKN, PINK1, PARK7, GBA1); Open Targets association signals and ClinVar gene-condition context.
Per ADR 0004 the two-disease pilot is a de-risk gate, not the manuscript dataset; this is an unlisted public-candidate preview alongside the Alzheimer line.
